DYlXBg.en-US: A terrifying entity has descended from beyond the deep abyss of chaos.

D4lXBg.es-ES: Atrápame y sígueme si te atreves.

EIlXBg.en-US: It's hard to play along when it's so boring.

EYlXBg.en-US: Maybe you should train for another hundred years?

EolXBg.en-US: You dare challenge me with such pitiful strength?
